professional_summary: Machine learning engineer with 5 years of experience developing and deploying production ML systems across NLP, computer vision, and recommendation domains. Proficient in PyTorch, TensorFlow, and large language model fine-tuning. Led end-to-end ML pipelines from data ingestion to model serving at scale using AWS SageMaker and MLflow.

work_experience.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
bullets: Fine-tuned LLMs (LLaMA, Mistral) for domain-specific Q&A using RAG and vector databases, improving retrieval accuracy by 42%
Built production NLP pipeline processing 5M+ documents daily using Hugging Face transformers and Apache Spark
Reduced model inference latency by 60% through quantization, ONNX export, and TensorRT optimization
Designed MLflow experiment tracking and model registry for 12-person ML team, cutting model retraining time by 35%
Implemented automated model monitoring with drift detection, triggering retraining when accuracy degraded below threshold

work_experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer
bullets: Developed computer vision models (object detection, image segmentation) achieving 94% precision on benchmark datasets
Built and deployed recommendation system using collaborative filtering and matrix factorization, increasing CTR by 18%
Trained scikit-learn and XGBoost models for fraud detection, reducing false positives by 27%
Managed end-to-end ML workflows on AWS SageMaker with automated hyperparameter tuning

work_experience.title: Data Scientist
bullets: Built statistical models in Python and R to forecast customer churn with 89% accuracy
Performed large-scale data analysis using PySpark on Hadoop cluster processing 2TB+ daily data
Created interactive ML experiment dashboards using Streamlit and Plotly for stakeholder reporting
Collaborated with engineers to deploy 3 models into production using FastAPI and Docker

projects.name: MultiModal RAG System
projects.description: Production RAG pipeline combining text and image embeddings with Pinecone and GPT-4V for enterprise document search
